tests.name: Resolving a reference whose name matches a single registry entry returns the live outcome resolve({ kind: 'name', value: 'nw-bdd-requirements' }, registry) returns { tag: 'live', entry: <user-scope skill> }

Resolving a reference whose name matches two or more registry entries returns the ambiguous outcome resolve({ kind: 'name', value: 'release' }, registry) returns { tag: 'ambiguous', candidates: [project, user] }

Resolving a reference that matches no registry entry returns the dead outcome with the searched scopes resolve({ kind: 'name', value: 'nw-retired-skill' }, registry) returns { tag: 'dead', searchedScopes: [...] }

Resolving a file-path reference to an item type the plugin does not expose returns the unsupported outcome resolve({ kind: 'path', value: '~/.claude/unknown-kind/foo.bin' }, registry) returns { tag: 'unsupported', path, reason }

Resolving a path that does not lie under .claude returns the dead outcome (extractDotClaudeCategory miss branch) resolve({ kind: 'path', value: /tmp/random/file.txt }) returns dead (leading-slash path with no .claude segment)

Resolving a path that does not lie under .claude returns the dead outcome (extractDotClaudeCategory miss branch) resolve({ kind: 'path', value: agents/foo.md }) returns dead (no-.claude path whose first segment matches a supported category)

Resolving a path that does not lie under .claude returns the dead outcome (extractDotClaudeCategory miss branch) resolve({ kind: 'path', value: tmp/random/file.txt }) returns dead (no-.claude path whose first segment is not a supported category)

Resolving a path that ends exactly at .claude with no segment after returns the dead outcome (no category to inspect) resolve({ kind: 'path', value: ~/.claude }) returns dead (trailing .claude with no slash -> next === undefined)

Resolving a path that ends exactly at .claude with no segment after returns the dead outcome (no category to inspect) resolve({ kind: 'path', value: ~/.claude/ }) returns dead (trailing slash -> next === '')

Resolving a path under a SUPPORTED .claude category that misses the registry returns the dead outcome (not unsupported) resolve({ kind: 'path', value: '~/.claude/skills/never-registered/SKILL.md' }) returns dead
The unsupported reason names every supported category and the offending category, joined by ', ' reason contains each SUPPORTED_CATEGORIES entry, the joiner, and the offending category
